news.title: Schon ab Oktober: Neue Regeln für Außengastronomie in der Kölner Altstadt - Verliebt in Köln
news.summary:
# Summary

Starting in October, new regulations for outdoor dining will take effect in Cologne's Old Town (Altstadt). While the article doesn't mention a specific restaurant, these rules will affect all outdoor seating areas throughout the historic district. Visitors should be aware of these changes as they may impact where and how they can dine al fresco in this popular tourist area.

news.title: Kurioser Standort: Indisches Restaurant am Melaten-Friedhof – Nachmittags gibt es Trauerfeiern - Kölner Stadt-Anzeiger
news.summary:
# Summary

An Indian restaurant has opened at an unusual location next to Melaten Cemetery in Cologne, operating alongside funeral services held in the afternoons. Visitors to Cologne interested in trying authentic Indian cuisine would find this spot noteworthy for its distinctive and somewhat unconventional setting within a cemetery complex. The juxtaposition of dining and memorial services makes it a curious destination that reflects Cologne's unique approach to mixed-use spaces.

news.title: NET OPEN. Kenzo Deswert (32) opent La Folie in Stadsschouwburg Antwerpen: “Totaalervaring met gastronomie, muziek en sfeer” - HLN
news.summary:
# Summary

Chef Kenzo Deswert (32) has opened a new restaurant called **La Folie** inside Antwerp's Stadsschouwburg (City Theater), offering a complete dining experience that combines gastronomy, live music, and atmosphere. Visitors to Antwerp looking for fine dining with entertainment should consider this venue, as it merges food with cultural elements in a unique theater setting.

# Summary

While the specific restaurant name isn't provided in the snippet, this highlights that Lisbon's seafood dining scene is particularly popular and highly sought-after. Visitors to Lisbon should note that traditional seafood restaurants ("marisqueiras") are in high demand, so advance reservations are essential for dining at the city's most popular spots.
